sn28.3:1.1: At Sāvatthī … . The Venerable Ānanda saw the Venerable Sāriputta coming in the distance … .
sn28.3:2.1: "Here, friend, with the fading away as well of rapture, I dwelt equanimous and, mindful and clearly comprehending, I experienced happiness with the body; I entered and dwelt in the third jhāna of which the noble ones declare: ‘He is equanimous, mindful, one who dwells happily.’ sn.iii.237 Yet, friend, it did not occur to me, ‘I am attaining the third jhāna … .’" Complete as in preceding sutta.
